# UploadsManager

Reach these methods through the `uploads` field on `Client`.

## uploadFileVersion

`POST /files/{file_id}/content`

| Parameter | In | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|---|
| `file_id` | path | `string` | yes |
| `if-match` | header | `string` | no |
| `fields` | query | `Array<string>` | no |
| `content-md5` | header | `string` | no |

**Request body** (`multipart/form-data`): `FileIdContentCreateRequest`

**Returns:** `Files`

**Example**

```ts
const result = await client.uploads.uploadFileVersion("FILE_ID", { /* … */ });
```
